msdyn_workorder.msdyn_workordersummary: Central heating not producing hot water. Customer reports issue started 3 days ago. Boiler is a Baxi 600 Combi (2019). Error code E133 showing on display. No unusual noises. Gas supply confirmed working. Previous engineer visit 6 months ago for annual service — no issues found at that time.
msdyn_workorder.msdyn_instructions: Access via back garden gate. Dog in front garden.

msdyn_workorder.msdyn_workordersummary: Annual gas boiler service for residential property. Customer has HomeCare 300 cover. Last service completed 12 months ago — all checks passed. Boiler is a Worcester Greenstar 30i (2018), located in kitchen utility cupboard. Customer requests morning appointment if possible.
msdyn_workorder.msdyn_instructions: Access via side gate. Key under mat.
Repair required at Lewis Fabrication Services Ltd. Customer reports excessive noise and vibration. Diagnose and repair.

name: LIVE: Account - Mobile Form
description: Account form: name as title, primary contact + territory subtitles, phone/email/web, composite address with map, revenue/employees grid, status/industry tags.

name: LIVE: Work Order - Service Form
description: Work order form: WO number title, service account + WO type subtitles, phone from WO, address, description + instructions details, system status + priority grid, tags for status/incident/priority.

name: Customer Asset
description: Asset form: asset name title, product + account subtitles, device ID + asset tag details, status tag. Compact layout for dense data.

name: Booking - Collapsed Start
description: Same as LIVE booking but starts collapsed. Shows header, contact bar, and tags only.

name: Booking - Desktop Full
description: Booking with contact layout for desktop — full detail with all related fields visible.

name: Booking - Offline
description: Booking in offline mode — tests that related field fetches work via the offline WebAPI store.

name: Account - Desktop
description: Account on desktop with contact layout — shows all grid fields and full address.

name: Work Order - Tablet
description: Work order on iPad with smart layout — good for technicians reviewing WOs on tablets.

name: Read-Only (Disabled)
description: Work order in read-only mode — control renders but no interaction.

name: Account - Compact Desktop
description: Account on desktop with COMPACT layout — proves Compact works for traditional MDA users wanting a dense, label:value form feel. Shows section headers (Contact / Details / Info).

name: Booking - Custom Separator + Copy Buttons
description: v4.1 features showcase: subtitle separator overridden to ' • ' (bullet) and copy-to-clipboard buttons render next to phone, email, and address chips on desktop. Hover the chips to see the new copy affordance.

name: Customer Asset - Preset Auto-Fill
description: Only titleField is bound — every other slot is left empty. The msdyn_customerasset preset auto-populates product, account, device ID, asset tag, lat/lng, and status. Demonstrates SLOT_PRESETS magic for new installs.

name: Sparse - Title Only
description: Only titleField is bound on an entity that has NO preset. Proves graceful degradation — the card renders with just the title, no broken zones, no empty placeholders. Use as the 'minimum viable binding' demo.

name: Dense Overload - All Slots Filled
description: Stress test: every single slot bound on an account — 3 subtitles, 2 phones, email, web, address with map, 6 grid fields, 3 tags. Proves the layout handles wrap, overflow, and visual density on a phone screen.

name: Contact - Avatar (Image URL)
description: Showcases the new imageField slot bound to entityimage_url. 40px circular avatar renders left of the title in Smart layout, fetched from a real URL. Uses Sarah Connor contact with a deterministic picsum.photos seed.

name: Contact - Avatar (Initials Fallback)
description: Same contact card but imageField is unbound — verifies the initials fallback. Title 'Sarah Connor' renders as 'SC' on a brand-coloured circular avatar in Smart and Contact layouts.
